name: noc-cyberjack-rfid
description: Runnable card and SAK-lite readiness gate before XNP login.

interface.shortDescription: Installable card-reader prerequisite before XNP login.
interface.longDescription: Installable local Codex plugin for notary card-readiness before XNP login and Online HRA work. It provides a runnable local readiness check for BNotK chip/signature card availability, compatible REINER SCT cyberJack reader readiness, RFID-off attestation for BNotK chip-card workflows, PC/SC state, BNotK SAK lite or XNP card path, secureFramework readiness, XNP localhost-interface metadata and evidence generation without PIN capture, API-key capture or card data extraction.
defaultPrompt: Generate local cyberJack readiness evidence before XNP login.
Create a notary card gate plan for Online HRA.
Review card-reader drift before XNP testing.
